This report maps GitClaw's configured model onto a reviewed GitHub Models catalog snapshot and default-selection policy. It does not call the catalog or inference endpoints. It reports model IDs, names, versions, limits, hashes, and gates only; raw catalog responses, provider responses, issue bodies, comments, prompts, credentials, and secret values are not included.
